Err.ok: ok=42
Err.bad: err=custom error
ErrF.ok: ok=42
ErrF.bad: err=transformed: strconv.Atoi: parsing "abc": invalid syntax
Wrap.ok: ok=42
Wrap.bad: err=wrap-context: strconv.Atoi: parsing "abc": invalid syntax
Wrapf.ok: ok=42
Wrapf.bad: err=wrapf-context "abc": strconv.Atoi: parsing "abc": invalid syntax
CatchRec.ok: ok=42
CatchRec.bad: ok=99
CatchXf.ok: ok=42
CatchXf.bad: err=catch-transformed: strconv.Atoi: parsing "abc": invalid syntax
